description: The Clemson Paw Packs club will devote ourselves to helping spread wealth within our community and to help local homeless shelters grow stronger by donating good specific to their needs. We will spread our name through social media where we will collect donations, package them, and deliver them to those in need. We hope to make a lasting and unique impact on our communities in the Clemson/Anderson/Oconee areas.
summary: By utilizing our members at Paw Packs we will collect and distribute various care packages to local homeless shelters surrounding the Clemson community.

name: Language in Healthcare
description:
Our mission is to equip future healthcare professionals with the language skills and cultural competence needed to provide effective, compassionate care to diverse patient populations. Through hands-on language practice, real-world scenarios, and engagement with professionals, we aim to bridge communication gaps in healthcare settings.

Join our Groupme!

Fill out our google form here
summary: We equip future healthcare professionals with language skills and cultural awareness to deliver compassionate, effective care—bridging communication gaps through hands-on practice, real-world scenarios, and professional engagement.

name: VAW Global Health Alliances Clemson Veterinary Chapter
description: VAW Global Health Alliances is a global health organization that focuses on providing free healthcare year-round to low-income communities in various countries. We are the Clemson Veterinary Chapter, and we focus on sending teams of interns to volunteer in community outreach clinics each year. By sending teams of interns, we get the valuable experience we need, and the organization gets the valuable help and funds they need to run the clinics year-round.
summary: VAW Global Health Alliances is a global health organization that focuses on providing free healthcare year-round to low-income communities in various countries. We are the Clemson Veterinary Chapter, and we focus on sending teams of interns to volunteer.

name: Clemson Hospice Health
description:
Clemson Hospice Health strives to create meaningful companionship, emotional support, and purposeful connection with hospice patients within and around the Clemson area. Through acts of service such as bouquet making, hosting group activities, card making, and direct one-on-one volunteering, we hope to raise community awareness, promote encouragement, comfort, and care. 

Join our Group Me for more information!! https://groupme.com/join_group/108880460/X6bXHQoP
summary: Clemson Hospice Health strives to create meaningful companionship, emotional support, and purposeful connection with hospice patients within and around the Clemson area.

name: Clemson Cold Cases
description: This club would greatly help prepare students for law school, as well as challenge them to analyze only the evidence presented, as it would be in cold cases. This club differs from a mock trial club because it is incorporating an interesting aspect of evidence being solely derived from cold cases. The inspiration behind this club began with the release of Monsters. This show, presented on Netflix, followed the details of the Menendez brothers' case and the evidence that led them to a guilty verdict. It received a mass following and a large audience of attention because it sparked great controversy and advocated for their release, but also highlighted how things done in the courtroom impacted the verdict. I want to get others involved similarly, but with cold cases. Cold cases are very intriguing and usually do not have the proper types/or amount of evidence to come to a verdict.
summary: Clemson Cold Cases is a club dedicated to helping students gain knowledge of the legal atmosphere in a trial setting, encourage critical thinking by debating cold cases with little/no hard evidence, and help students with oral advocacy skills.

name: Tiger Shock
description:
Tiger Shock is a new club at Clemson University dedicated to fundraising for the placement of Automated External Defibrillators (AEDs) in high schools throughout the Clemson area. The use of an AED within minutes of cardiac arrest can more than double a person’s chance of survival — in some cases reaching over 70%. Yet, many schools still lack access to these life-saving devices when and where they’re needed most.

That’s why Tiger Shock is driven to increase AED accessibility in local high schools — to give students, staff, and visitors a fighting chance when every second matters.

Join us in the effort to bring more AEDs into our schools, raise awareness about sudden cardiac arrest, and empower our community to be ready when it counts most.
summary: Raising funds for lifesaving AEDs in local schools. Empowering safety, one heartbeat at a time.

name: Clemson Quantum Club
description:
Welcome to Clemson Quantum Club! We're an academic club focused on giving students the opportunity to learn and interact with quantum computing with no assumptions of prior knowledge. We encourage participation across disciplines, and want to provide tools for hands-on learning.

Potential Activities Include:
- Hackathons (SC Quantathon, MIT iQuHack, NYUAD Hackathon for Social Good)
- Speakers/Seminars
- Games (Quantum Chess!)

We meet every other week, members vote on the time. Time/location changes by semester. If you're interested,  join our discord to stay caught up on announcements!
summary: We want to give students the opportunity to learn and interact with quantum computing with no assumptions of prior knowledge. We encourage participation across disciplines, and want to provide tools for hands-on learning.

name: M.I.S.S. Heart of Unity
description: M.I.S.S Heart of Unity is a year-round organization created to uplift and inspire women at Clemson University while promoting conversation on cross-cultural experiences on campus. The purpose of this organization is to help bring about a boost of confidence as well as build interpersonal and intercultural skills.
summary: M.I.S.S Heart of Unity is a supportive space for women at Clemson to grow in confidence, connect across cultures, and celebrate sisterhood through meaningful conversations and community.

name: Tiger Snuggles
description: Tiger Snuggles is a student organization that runs stuffed animal drives throughout the year for children in need. This 25-26 year, we are working towards establishing ourselves as an official chapter of Stuffed Animals For Emergencies (SAFE). We successfully ran our first drive from February 2-6, 2026 and collected copious amounts of donations. All of these donations will be sent to an urgent needs location in Greensboro, NC. We plan to have at least two more drives in the Spring of 2026 to benefit the children at both Oconee Memorial Hospital as well as Greenville Memorial Hospital.
summary: Organize stuffed animal drives for children in need.

name: Athletics Marketing and Fan Experience
summary: Clemson Athletics Marketing and Fan Experience brings energy, creativity, and passion to build strong and loyal fan bases and aims to deliver gamed experiences that are unmatched!

name: Clemson Pre-med Skills Society
description: Join Group Me- https://groupme.com/join_group/110709893/vvR2DEWX
summary: Our organization will host hands-on workshops to work on the practical side of medical school such as teaching how to suture, obtain vital signs, perform CPR, and other emergency care techniques to help pre-med students gain early clinical experience.

name: FeelGood Clemson
description: FeelGood isn’t just a club, we’re a movement of passionate college students taking action with purpose. We are hosting bold events, and raising critical funds for The Hunger Project’s mission to end hunger. The FeelGood program framework reflects the founding pillars of our organization, The Hunger Project, to start with women, mobilize communities, and engage local government. We are committed to the power of women’s leadership and equality, they are trained and empowered to enroll their campus community in their efforts to end hunger.
summary: FeelGood isn’t just a club, we’re a movement of passionate college students taking action with purpose. We are hosting bold events, and raising critical funds for The Hunger Project’s mission to end hunger. The FeelGood program framework reflects the fou

name: Zeta Psi
description:
We founded strictly on no hazing and plan to keep it that way for many years to come. Our connections and network to our International HQ staff and brothers around the globe is like no other chapter here on campus. We bring a new reputation to Clemson and a fresh start for interested members to build something from the ground up. 

Our philanthropy partners with One Love, a non-profit focused on helping raise awareness around abusive relationships.
summary:
We are a new fraternity on campus, just chartered on 8/23/25. We were founded in the Spring '25 and will participate in the full fall rush this September. 
We are the international fraternity with chapters in Europe and Canada, one in Africa.

name: United Through Loss
summary: United Through Loss is a grief support group where those of us in the Clemson Family who have lost a loved one can come together and support one another. We are also here to educate our community about grief and change the negative narrative behind it.

name: Clemson Law Review
description:
The Clemson Law Review (CLR) is a student-edited journal and independent student organization dedicated to publishing high-quality legal scholarship on pressing topics. The journal publishes articles of the highest caliber written by judges, legal practitioners, policymakers, professors from any university, and Clemson pre–law students. 

 

For at least its first year, the CLR will be published exclusively online. While the CLR will be led by Clemson students and advised by a Clemson professor, the website will contain a disclaimer in all published articles stating that the University does not endorse any viewpoints expressed in the publication.

ClemsonLawReview
summary: The Clemson Law Review (CLR) is a student-edited journal dedicated to publishing high-quality legal scholarship on pressing topics.

name: Healing Harmonies
description: Healing Harmonies will organize and deliver live performances in hospitals, clinics, and rehabilitation centers. It will also attempt to conduct studies on how live music impacts patients' perception of pain, anxiety, and mood. It will also collect feedback from patients, families, and healthcare providers to improve programming and research outcomes. Volunteer members, both musicians and non-musicians, are trained to perform in sensitive healthcare settings, coordinate events, and assist with patient engagement. Core activities include regular live performances in hospital lobbies, waiting rooms, and patient units; themed concerts during holidays; and community fundraising events to support instruments and outreach. The research component focuses on studying how music influences pain perception, stress reduction, and overall well-being through patient surveys, physiological measures, and qualitative feedback. Healing Harmonies blends service, art, and science into a sustainable, compassionate initiative that both comforts patients and contributes to the field of integrative medicine.
summary: Healing Harmonies aims to bring hope and healing through the power of live music in hospitals and healthcare settings. Beyond service, we also seek to advance knowledge through research into music's influence on pain perception, stress, and well-being.

name: Health Horizons Journal
description: This organization would edit and publish articles submitted by students and professionals locally and globally as well as conduct journalistic interviews, producing publications in an effort to tackle the current issues of global health translation while forming global connections.
summary: This organization aims to address and combat global health challenges through knowledge, innovation, and research translation through collaboration with students and professionals globally, through research publications and multimedia outreach.

name: Indoor Soccer Club
description: Looking for a co-ed pick up indoor soccer games and a chance to test your soccer skills? Clemson indoor soccer club will provide you with that and even more. With scheduled and pick up futsal games with fellow tigers. No need to worry about getting a good game in when you can count on us. We are a very friendly and driven club, all levels are welcomed to join. We will have goals, balls and pennies available for top tier game experience. Our future events will include daily to weekly games, tournaments at the end of the semester and collaborative events with clubs. You do not have to be a huge soccer fan to join us! Our club is the perfect opportunity to start a new hobby and meet some tigers with the added bonus of challenging yourself.
summary: Indoor soccer club where tigers can come together to compete in scheduled and pick-up futsal games. Open to all skill levels, and it is coed, we will have tournaments at the end of the semester. Perfect opportunity to make friends and enjoy some soccer.

name: Clemson Renewable Energy Club
description:
Clemson Renewable Energy Club is an independent, student-led, engineering-focused organization dedicated to renewable and sustainable sources of energy. Experienced members of the club lead projects in designing and building machines such as wind and water turbines, solar power systems, and bio/chemical methods of energy collection.

New members are provided with resources to learn and grow as engineers, while also having opportunities to contribute directly to the club’s projects. As the organization develops, we aim to participate in community service and sustainability summits, giving members the chance to network with industry professionals and students from other universities, while showcasing the innovation and capability of Clemson Engineers.

For more information about the club, please contact us at clemsonrec@gmail.com.
summary: Clemson Renewable Energy Club is the best way to get hands on engineering expierience with renewable energy source mechanisms. Join student lead teams to research, model, design, and build renewable and sustainable sources of energy.

name: Kamp Love
description: If you're looking for a way to find community in Christ, a break from class, time with the Lord, or just to go camping, Kamp Love is such a good outlet for all! All are welcome to come! There will be fun and games, friendly competition, FOOD :), worship, prayer, group time, campfire talks, and so much more!
summary: Kamp Love's mission is to transform students by the gospel through camping, community, connection, and Christ!! A bi-yearly retreat: Fall Kamp is a 24-hour camping trip out in God's creation, and Spring Kamp is a 3-day weekend retreat in cabins.

name: Coptic Student Organization
description: • The Coptic Student Organization’s purpose is to promote spiritual growth, cultural awareness, and a strong sense of community among students through the teachings and traditions of the Coptic Orthodox Church. CSO will host weekly Bible studies, prayer meetings, guest speaker events, cultural celebrations, service projects, and social gatherings to encourage faith, fellowship, and service. Our goal is to support students in their spiritual journey, educate others about the Coptic faith, and create a welcoming space for all to grow in Christ and community.
summary: The Coptic Student Organization’s purpose is to promote spiritual growth and a strong sense of community among students through the teachings and traditions of the Coptic Orthodox Church.

name: Tiger Military Alliance
description: The Tiger Military Alliance exists to benefit the Clemson military community. To advocate on behalf of the Clemson Military community to ensure all military-connected students and organizations are equipped with the proper resources they need to thrive and make a positive and lasting impact on the community and their future.
summary: Tiger Military Alliance aids military connected students in having a voice in the Clemson community, and a well resourced education.

name: Love for Our Elders
description: This organization is a non-profit that has chapters all over the country. This new chapter at Clemson will allow students to become involved and make a difference to older generations. During our meetings, we will write and send letters, and reach out to local retirement communities for partnerships to send letters there.
summary: Love For Our Elders aims to lessen elderly loneliness and alleviate social isolation through letter writing. This new Clemson chapter will focus primarily on letter writing across the country and to retirement communities in the nearby area.

name: i5 Space
description:
From the i5 Space website:
i5 Space is a national student organization that operates in conjunction with the U.S. Space Force’s Space Training and Readiness and Command (STARCOM). We aim to deliver educational, training, and professional development resources to students around the country who are interested in pursuing a career in the newest branch of the US military—the Space Force. We are growing every day and currently boast more than 1000 members from 67 different Squadrons! We are also proud to have research partnerships with the Space Force and NATO.
summary: i5 Space is a national organization meant to develop an awareness of the US Space Force in students.

name: Grass Volleyball Club
description: We are a diverse group of students who love to play grass volleyball. We play multiple days a week, usually in the afternoon, on Bowman and the Intramural fields. We hold tournaments every month that are a good time, and you meet new people at them. Our goal is for everyone who comes to play to feel welcome, enjoy their time there, and get better at volleyball. The weather is so pretty here in Clemson, why not take advantage of it?
summary: We play grass volleyball on the IMs and Bowman multiple days a week. We also hold tournaments ranging from 2's to 4's.

name: Clemson Trading Card Club
description: Clemson Trading Card Club is a student organization where Clemson students can join a casual and friendly community with similar interests in collecting and trading cards. We welcome all collectors regardless of experience from any and every card game. Come join us for our meetings which occur 1-2 times a month where we will play with and trade our cards with one another.
summary: We are a group focused on bringing together a community to play, trade, and collect card from various TCG's like pokemon, yugioh, magic, and sports cards.

name: Botanical Society of America Clemson Chapter
description:
The Botanical Society of America Clemson Chapter hopes to create a network of plant and nature lovers at any level to come together while offering academic and social opportunities through the Botanical Society of America (BSA), including discussion of scientific literature, hikes, outreach, and volunteering opportunities on campus and the community. 
Members of the chapter get a 50% discount for student memberships to the BSA, discounted registration to the annual Botany conference (biggest plant biology conference in the US), and are eligible to apply to the BSA graduate and undergraduate research awards.
summary: The Botanical Society of America Clemson Chapter connects plant lovers through plant-related events and offers discounts on BSA memberships, Botany conference fees, and research awards.

name: Clemson Biomedical Data Science and Informatics Student Association
description: The Clemson Biomedical Data Science and Informatics Student Association promotes social interaction between graduate students, facilitates communication with University stakeholders, and identifies professional development opportunities for students.
summary: The Clemson Biomedical Data Science and Informatics Student Association promotes social interaction between graduate students, facilitates communication with University stakeholders, and identifies professional development opportunities for students.

name: Clemson Speech Language Pathology Association
description: Our mission is to provide resources and support to students interested in the field of Speech-Language Pathology. Members of CSLPA will participate in volunteer events, networking activities, and field experiences.
summary: The Clemson Speech-Language Pathology Association (CSLPA) is a student-led organization dedicated to promoting education, awareness, and professional development in the field of Speech-Language Pathology.

name: Kingdom at Hand
description: As servants of our King Jesus, our mission is God's will be done, in our hearts, in our city, and on earth, as it is in heaven. We organize Bible studies around the Clemson area on a weekly basis.
summary: As servants of our King Jesus, our mission is God's will be done, in our hearts, in our city, and on earth, as it is in heaven.

name: Donkey Kong Country Roleplay Club
description:
Donkey Kong Country Roleplay Club is dedicated to bringing a fun and satirical environment for those who wish to truly Roleplay as Donkey Kong Country characters. Or those who would just like to visit as a spectator to this novel concept and the real and possibly dedicated execution of it. Despite the exceptionally unique premise, we are hopeful in bringing together a group of people who can bond and create quality time through humor and new experiences. Whether you're a dedicated DK fan, or have hardly ever heard of the character, you're more than welcome to be a part of the DK Crew! Especially if you like bananas. If you have any questions at all, feel free to ask!

For members or those interested, you can join our GroupMe from the Globe Icon featured in contact information below!
summary: The Donkey Kong Country Roleplay Club is an organization dedicating to roleplaying Donkey Kong Country characters and scenes in a creative, friendly, and real-life environment. All are welcome no matter the knowledge of DKC!!

name: Clemson Comic Book Club
description: Our organization serves the purpose of sharing the often underappreciated medium of comic books with members of Clemson's student body. We intend on welcoming students of any knowledge level regarding comics, whether they are avid readers, have seen a few movies, or are completely ignorant in the subject. Our club meetings will involve book discussions, collection sharing, movie nights, and more with a focus on appealing to as many comic enjoyers as possible.
summary: We host fun events where students can meet up and discuss all things related to comic books. We discuss movies, video games, reading material, and collecting. We also host movie nights, book discussions, and game nights.

name: Clemson Lauvers League
description: This organization operates as a Laufey fan club. Our mission is to unite Clemson students with similar interests and to promote a collective appreciation of music, art, and literature. Events include craft nights and listening parties where students can celebrate the release of new music. This club provides a wholesome environment where students can come together and foster a shared love of all things Laufey!
summary: Clemson Lauvers League is a fan club for students who want to celebrate all things Laufey!

name: Clemson Pre-CRNAs
description: Clemson Pre-CRNAs Club is an undergraduate student organization for nursing students aspiring to become Certified Registered Nurse Anesthetists (CRNAs). The club fosters connections among like-minded peers, provides access to valuable professional resources, and helps members prepare for their future careers in nurse anesthesia. To join the group me use this link: https://groupme.com/join_group/110890627/lSNYpCHt
summary: Clemson Pre-CRNAs Club unites nursing students aspiring to become CRNAs, fostering connections, offering professional resources, and preparing members for future careers in nurse anesthesia.

name: Clemson Fragrance Club
description: Clemson's student organization for all things fragrance! Whether you enjoy perfume, cologne, body care, home fragrances, or anything in between, we are happy to have you! Join for a mix of hands-on activities, eligibility for giveaways, educational meetings, scent experiences, and service opportunities.
summary: Indulge in good scents and good company!

name: Mu Epsilon Delta
description: Our mission is to prepare members to succeed in pre-health careers through the development of scholarship, fraternity, and service. We encourage excellence in health science scholarship through promoting a holistic model of healthcare by fostering cooperation and collaboration between various pre-health disciplines, educations, and professionals. We aim to establish brotherhood among students interested in similar career paths by enriching the student experience, bolstering professional networks, and inspiring personal growth.
summary: Mu Epsilon Delta is a co-educational, pre-health professional fraternity whose purpose is to prepare members to succeed in pre-health careers.

name: BICEFS Graduate Student Association
description: The Baruch Institute of Coastal Ecology and Forest Science (BICEFS) Graduate Student Association was established to bring together off-campus students utilizing this REC. This organization provides graduate students opportunities for professional and academic development to improve student well-being and long-term career goals.
summary: The Baruch Institute of Coastal Ecology and Forest Science (BICEFS) Graduate Student Association was established to bring together off-campus students utilizing this REC.

name: Magical Moments
description:
CU Magical Moments Instagram

CU Magical Moments Groupme

The Magical Moments Club is a community dedicated to supporting children with facial differences by granting “magical moments”. Through fundraising, volunteering, and advocacy, the club helps create these life-changing memories while spreading awareness.
summary: The Magical Moments Club is a community dedicated to supporting children with facial differences by granting “magical moments”. Through fundraising, volunteering, and advocacy, the club helps create these life-changing memories while spreading awareness.

name: Delta Sigma Delta
description:
Delta Sigma Delta is the worlds oldest and most recognized dental fraternity that is organized to foster not only professional excellence but also service, brotherhood, and leadership development. The prestigious dental fraternity was founded in 1882 at the University of Michigan, Ann Arbor and has continued to grow to host 75 and counting chapters worldwide. 

 

Since granted its charter by the national committee in 1882, our members have been driven to bridge the gap between undergraduates and the broader dental profession through regular meetings and engaging events. From community service projects with the Dental Lifeline Network to enriching social retreats, DSD offers every member opportunities to grow, connect, and make a lasting impact.
summary: Delta Sigma Delta, founded at the University of Michigan, is the world’s oldest and most recognized dental fraternity. With 75+ chapters worldwide, DSD fosters excellence, service, brotherhood, and leadership through events, service, and connection.

name: Clemson Financial Planning Club
summary: The Clemson Financial Planning Club connects students with industry leaders, hosts recruiting and networking events, and explores the CFP® pathway and financial planning career opportunities.

name: Indivisible Clemson Students
description: Indivisible Clemson Students is a branch of national Indivisible organization. ICS members will meet with local volunteer advocates to learn about how to organize and plan peaceful expressions of free speech. ICS will also advocate for change on university, community, state, and federal levels.
summary: Progressive, non-partisan, grassroots organization to promote democracy, due process, and humanitarian leadership and educate members on peaceful protests and political action.

name: Love Does in Action Clemson
description:
Love Does in Action gives students the opportunity to partner with the nonprofit organization Love Does in Action. Our mission is to create a community that exhibits Love in action. We are presenting college students with the question, “If you received a small grant, how would you use that to impact your community?”The mission of this club is to engage college students in serving their local and international communities by providing them with the necessary resources. Through service projects and collaboration, we give Clemson students the opportunity to serve others and grow as leaders. 

As a member of Love Does in Action Clemson, you will join a community that is passionate about service and making Love tangible through action.
summary: Our organization provides students the ability to partner with the nonprofit organization Love Does to serve their communities through love in action and advocacy.

name: Packages of Hope Clemson
description:
Packages of Hope–Clemson is a service-oriented student organization committed to supporting pediatric patients and their families at Prisma Health Children’s Hospital–Upstate. The organization assembles and delivers care packages containing comfort items, small gifts, and encouraging messages to children receiving medical care.
In addition to care package initiatives, Packages of Hope–Clemson engages in other charitable activities such as handmade card making, toy drives, and seasonal donation efforts. Through these projects, members strive to foster community engagement, promote compassion, and provide hope to children and families in need.
summary: Packages of Hope–Clemson is a student organization dedicated to supporting Prisma Health Children’s Hospital–Upstate by creating and delivering care packages, handmade cards, and toys to bring comfort, hope, and joy to children and their families.

name: Men of Ministry
description: This is a Christ-centered organization founded with the purpose of creating a safe, welcoming, and encouraging environment for men who seek to strengthen their relationship with the Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. Our mission is to provide a space where brothers in Christ can build meaningful relationships, engage in fellowship, and support one another in their walk with God. By cultivating a community rooted in the biblical teachings, we aim to empower men to live out their faith boldly, hold each other accountable, and grow together in love, service, and devotion.
summary: This is a Christ-centered organization that was created with the end goal of creating a safe space where brothers in Christ can have community and fellowship together. This creates a space where men can follow the Lord Jesus Christ with brotherly support

name: Clemson Hellenic Student Association
description: The primary purpose of the Hellenic Student Association is to promote, preserve, and celebrate Greek culture. This will include attending St George Greek Orthodox Church in Greenville at least monthly, practicing common Greek traditions together, celebrating holidays, cooking traditional foods, hosting educational events about our culture, etc. Our overall goal is to bring a piece of home to Clemson, doing activities with each other that we would usually be doing with our family back home. We hope to give people with similar backgrounds a place of comfort and familiarity.
summary: CHSA is a student-led organization dedicated to uniting students of Greek heritage and celebrating culture.

name: Asian Unity Resilience and Ambition
description: We are a group of women planning and organizing a bid to then charter the aKDPhi sorority on the Clemson University campus. We are an all-inclusive group, accepting women of all races, ethnicities, and backgrounds. We are not bound to just Asian women members. OPAL (formally known as AURA) is looking for strong women wanting to further their leadership skills, find their people, and become active in their community.
summary: An interest group planning to charter an aKDPhi chapter on Clemson University. We look for women that want to build community and leadership skills while also promoting our core values. We are an all-inclusive group, open to all races and identities.

name: CUSG Elections Board
summary: This is the formal page that all CUSG elections will be run through.
